chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 88 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 646/18. (Exemption) 2. For hearing of main case. 4. For order on CMA No. 647/18. (stay) 16.12.2025 Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for applicant. This reference is pending since 2018 without any progress. On 05.03.2021, following order was passed:- “Counsel for the Applicant needs time to place on record orders passed in other Customs Appeal Nos. K-1716/2016 to K-1718/2016, K-1669/2026 to K- 1674/2016 and K-1779/2016. At her request time allowed. Adjourned. Today, learned counsel is present and submits that order could not be complied with. No justification is articulated. In view hereof, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
